overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the neon-lit downtown streets of Night City at night. The character follows a pedestrian along a commercial sidewalk lined with digital billboards and storefronts, eventually entering an NCART subway station.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with digital billboards and neon signage

events.description: camera overtakes the pedestrian in pink outfit and continues forward

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in pink clothing along a neon-lit sidewalk, then passing them to continue down the street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink shorts and red top walking ahead, then being overtaken by the camera

entered.detail: massive overhead digital billboard displaying anime-style character with pink hair and Japanese text
orange metal barriers separating the sidewalk from the street
building facade with large circular C logo and Biotechnica corporate signage
tall buildings covered with illuminated advertisements and glowing neon signs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a neon-lit downtown street at night, following a pedestrian in pink clothing. The camera walks along a concrete sidewalk bordered by orange traffic barriers, passing beneath a massive anime billboard while surrounded by towering buildings covered in digital advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with pawn shops and street vendors

events.description: passing by a pawn shop with large digital billboard showing a man drinking from a cup
camera turns slightly right to view the pawn shop entrance then continues straight

agents.ego_description: walking down the commercial street, observing storefronts and pedestrians along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: street vendor standing beside a cart near the pawn shop entrance

entered.detail: large digital screen displaying advertisement of a man drinking from a white cup
small yellow and teal booth structure with PAWNSHOP signage
yellow and black striped construction barriers near the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the neon-lit street, the camera passes the pawn shop with its prominent digital billboard and yellow booth. The orange traffic barriers recede into the distance on the left as the character walks past street vendors and various storefronts, maintaining a steady pace through the sparse crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART subway station entrance with green neon lighting

events.description: entering the covered NCART station area with distinct green neon lighting and enclosed ceiling
interacting with the NCART terminal to view the subway map interface

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the NCART subway station, then interacting with the transit map terminal

entered.detail: subway station entrance with green glass doors and NCART signage reading Night City Area Rapid Transit
illuminated sign indicating North Heywood district above the station entrance
purple and red automated vending machines with glowing advertisements
fluorescent green lighting strips illuminating the station ceiling and structural beams

segments.scene_description: The character enters the covered NCART station, transitioning from the open street to a sheltered space bathed in green neon light. The camera approaches the subway entrance marked by the North Heywood sign, passing vending machines before stopping to interact with the transit map terminal displaying the Night City subway routes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched downtown corridor that eventually descends into a sheltered transit hub. It begins by trailing a pedestrian in pink clothing along a concrete sidewalk, passing beneath a massive anime billboard and towering digital advertisements. As the camera continues forward, the orange traffic barriers recede to the left while the scene shifts past a pawn shop with a yellow booth and various street vendors. The open street then transitions into the covered NCART station, where the lighting shifts to a dominant green neon glow. Finally, the camera moves past vending machines and a North Heywood sign before coming to a stop at a transit map terminal.
